darkSkySites.name: La Brea Pitch Lake area
darkSkySites.description: Open southern horizons away from Port of Spain light dome. Good for Crux and Magellanic Clouds.

darkSkySites.name: Nariva Swamp / Manzanilla coast
darkSkySites.description: Eastern dark skies with low horizon toward the Atlantic. Best on moonless nights.

darkSkySites.name: Tobago Main Ridge
darkSkySites.description: Darker skies than Trinidad; excellent for Milky Way and deep-sky targets.

seasonalTips.tip: Clearest nights for stargazing. Plan sessions after 8 PM when humidity drops.
Watch cloud forecasts; brief clear windows after evening showers can be excellent.

southernSkyHighlights: Large Magellanic Cloud (LMC) — naked-eye galaxy in the south
Small Magellanic Cloud (SMC) — companion to the LMC
Alpha Centauri — brightest star in Centaurus, low in the south
